projects.name: app-dashboard
projects.description: Daily automation that fetches App Store Connect stats for PatchPal and MealSight, updates a GitHub Gist with data.json, generates a dashboard HTML, and emails a summary to sushwason@gmail.com.

schedulers.name: daily-dashboard.yml
schedulers.notes: 9 AM PST / 10 AM PDT — drifts 1hr during daylight saving

todos: Fix cron drift: change to '0 16 * * *' to fire at 9 AM PDT during daylight saving
notes: ASC API data delayed 24-72 hrs by Apple — numbers will always lag vs. the dashboard UI. Cannot be fixed.
Email sent from patchpalfeedback@gmail.com to sushwason@gmail.com
Key script: scripts/update_dashboard.py | Email template: dashboard_email.html
warnings: Cron fires at 10 AM PDT (not 9 AM) during daylight saving (Mar-Nov). Fix: change to '0 16 * * *'.

projects.name: SafeSF
projects.description: ML system to predict San Francisco 311 service request volumes and patterns, helping the city allocate resources proactively. Includes a REST API, interactive dashboard with maps, and automated daily data updates.

schedulers.name: Data updater
schedulers.notes: Fetches from SF 311 Open Data portal

notes: Data source: SF 311 public portal — 5M+ requests from 2008 to present
ML models: Volume Predictor (XGBoost+Prophet, ~15% MAPE), Hotspot Detector (DBSCAN, 85% precision), Category Classifier (RF+NLP, 92% accuracy)
